sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115743" key="yilopoie/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψῑλο-ποιέω</orth>, <sense id="n115743.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">write with a smooth breathing,</tr_> Theodoretus <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περὶ πνευμάτων</foreign> in cod. Barocc. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">68</biblScope> </bibl> (Epit. of Hdn.Gr.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καθολικὴ προσῳδία,</foreign> Bk. xx).</sense> </entryFree>
